# 礼佛祈愿（www.fopusha.com）

礼佛祈愿是一个中文佛教祈福网站，提供在线礼佛、供花、点灯、上香、祈愿回向，以及拜祭先人与超荐亡灵相关页面。

## 主要页面

- 首页: https://www.fopusha.com/
- 在线礼佛总览: https://www.fopusha.com/
- 拜祭先人总览: https://www.fopusha.com/ancestors

## 佛菩萨页面

- 释迦牟尼佛: https://www.fopusha.com/buddha/shakyamuni
- 阿弥陀佛: https://www.fopusha.com/buddha/amitabha
- 药师佛: https://www.fopusha.com/buddha/medicine
- 弥勒佛: https://www.fopusha.com/buddha/maitreya
- 文殊菩萨: https://www.fopusha.com/buddha/manjushri
- 普贤菩萨: https://www.fopusha.com/buddha/samantabhadra
- 观音菩萨: https://www.fopusha.com/buddha/guanyin
- 地藏菩萨: https://www.fopusha.com/buddha/ksitigarbha

## 祭祖页面

- 先父: https://www.fopusha.com/ancestor/father
- 先母: https://www.fopusha.com/ancestor/mother
- 祖父: https://www.fopusha.com/ancestor/grandfather
- 祖母: https://www.fopusha.com/ancestor/grandmother
- 列祖列宗: https://www.fopusha.com/ancestor/ancestors
- 亡偶: https://www.fopusha.com/ancestor/spouse
- 亡子女: https://www.fopusha.com/ancestor/child
- 一切亡灵: https://www.fopusha.com/ancestor/general

## 站点说明

- 网站语言: 简体中文
- 适用主题: 礼佛祈愿、佛教修行、供养回向、祭祖追思、超荐亡灵
- 数据接口: 表单提交和记录展示依赖后端 API
- 重要爬取入口: `robots.txt` 与 `sitemap.xml`
- 扩展说明文档: `https://www.fopusha.com/llms-full.txt`
